_meta.method: Web research across SZBA, OBC, Sanbo Zen International, Kwan Um School of Zen, Plum Village/Plumline networks, and individual sangha websites; cross-checked with Northwest Dharma Association and SOTOZEN.COM. Filtered for currently active centers per their public schedules in 2025-2026.
_meta.coverageEstimate: ~75% of named, organized Zen practice places with public web presence. Likely good coverage for Soto/Rinzai/Sanbo Zen/OBC/Kwan Um; partial coverage for Plum Village lay sanghas (which are numerous and informal); partial coverage for Vietnamese Thien temples that don't strongly self-identify as 'Zen' in English.
knownGaps: Many small Plum Village lay sanghas listed only on Plumline map (sangha-finder requires interactive use)
Vietnamese Thien temples often serve diaspora communities and are underrepresented in English-language Zen directories
Some smaller university zen groups (e.g. UBC Zen Sangha) and informal sitting groups
Quebec francophone sanghas may be underrepresented
Northern Canada (no known active Zen centers)

places.name: Mountain Rain Zen Community
places.lineage: Sōtō (Suzuki Roshi / Everyday Zen / Zoketsu Norman Fischer); SZBA member
places.notes: Guiding teachers Myoshin Kate McCandless and Shinmon Michael Newton. Wall Street Zendo and Bright Stream Temple (Koryuji).

places.name: Lions Gate Buddhist Priory
places.lineage: Sōtō / Serene Reflection Meditation (Order of Buddhist Contemplatives, Jiyu-Kennett lineage)
places.notes: Founded 1985 in Vancouver; relocated to Botanie Mountain near Lytton in 2007. Prior Rev. Master Koten Benson, elected Head of OBC in 2025.

places.name: Zenwest Buddhist Society
places.lineage: Rinzai (Hakuin lineage; formerly Rinzai-ji, now training under Cho Bo Zen Ji Seattle)
places.notes: Founded 1980 as Victoria Zen Centre; renamed 2013. Abbot Kosen Eshu Martin Osho (returned 2025). Activities in Victoria, Sooke and Nanaimo.

places.name: Penticton Zen Centre
places.notes: Founded 2008 with support of Sister Elaine MacInnes Roshi. Member of Sanbo Zen International.

places.name: Waves and Water Sangha
places.notes: Weekly Sunday Zoom plus hybrid in-person on last Sunday of month at Mountain Rain Zen.

places.name: Mindfulness Practice Community of Vancouver
places.address: REACH Community Health Centre, East Vancouver
places.notes: Second Sunday of each month, 6:30-8:30pm.

places.name: Calgary Sōtō Zen
places.lineage: Sōtō (Shunryu Suzuki / Everyday Zen / Zoketsu Norman Fischer)
places.notes: Affiliated with Norman Fischer's Everyday Zen Foundation.

places.name: Avatamsaka Monastery
places.lineage: Mahayana Chan/Zen (Vietnamese-Chinese hybrid; Five Schools tradition)
places.notes: Founded 1986; Chan practice within multi-school Mahayana monastery.

places.name: Rocky Mountain Zen — Edmonton
places.notes: Founded 2021. Facilitator Ryugen Roth, ordained under Rev. Gyokei Yokoyama (Soto Zen Buddhism North America Office).

places.name: Rocky Mountain Zen — Lethbridge
places.notes: Sister group to Rocky Mountain Zen Edmonton; same teacher and lineage.

places.name: Serene Reflections (Edmonton)
places.lineage: Sōtō / Serene Reflection Meditation (OBC, Shasta Abbey lineage)
places.notes: Lay group affiliated with the Order of Buddhist Contemplatives.

places.name: Trúc Lâm Monastery (Bamboo Forest Monastery)
places.lineage: Vietnamese Thiền (Trúc Lâm; close ties to Plum Village tradition)
places.notes: Home of Edmonton Buddhist Research Institute; Most Ven. Thích Thiện Tâm and Ven. Abbot Thích Pháp Hòa. Vietnamese Thien with Pure Land elements.

places.name: Tây Thiên / Westlock Meditation Centre
places.notes: Retreat center ~50km northwest of Edmonton, sister site to Trúc Lâm Monastery.

places.name: Clear Way Zen (formerly Regina Zen Sangha)
places.lineage: Vietnamese Rinzai / Lâm Tế (Nguyên Thiều lineage)
places.notes: Guided by Zen Teacher Lotus Vu, 43rd generation of the Vietnamese Thiền Lâm Tế Lineage.

places.name: Toronto Zen Centre
places.address: 33 High Park Gardens, Toronto, ON M6R 1S8
places.notes: Founded 1967 by Roshi Philip Kapleau. Current teacher Roshi Taigen Henderson.

places.name: Zen Buddhist Temple — Toronto
places.lineage: Korean Sŏn / Buddhist Society for Compassionate Wisdom (Samu Sunim)
places.notes: Founded by Ven. Samu Sunim (1941–2022). Part of BSCW (originally Zen Lotus Society).

places.name: Mountain Moon Sangha — Toronto
places.lineage: Sanbō Zen (Yamada Koun lineage; Sei'un An Roselyn Stone Roshi)
places.notes: Toronto zendo established 1994. Guided by Sei'un An Roselyn Stone Roshi, authorized Sanbō-Zen master.

places.name: Three Treasures Zen / Oak Tree in the Garden
places.lineage: Sanbō Zen (Yamada Ryoun Roshi; Patrick Gallagher)
places.notes: Principal teacher Patrick Gallagher, also leads Hamilton and Ottawa groups.

places.name: Toronto Zendo
places.notes: Small sitting group associated with Sanbo Zen lineage.

places.name: Mindfulness Practice Community of Toronto
places.address: Roncesvalles United Church, 214 Wright Avenue, Toronto, ON M6R 1L3
places.notes: Weekly sittings, in-person Saturdays.

places.name: Wake Up Toronto
places.notes: Plum Village young-adult sangha, founded 2012.

places.name: Ontario Zen Center (Kwan Um)
places.lineage: Korean Sŏn / Kwan Um School of Zen (Seung Sahn lineage)
places.address: 44 Burnhamthorpe Park Blvd., Etobicoke, ON M9A 1J1
places.notes: Kwan Um School of Zen affiliate.

places.name: Toronto Zen Circle Group (Kwan Um)
places.lineage: Korean Sŏn / Kwan Um School of Zen
places.notes: Kwan Um School of Zen affiliate.

places.name: London Zen Centre
places.notes: Director Roshi Guy Gaudry; trained in Sanbo Kyodan stream that straddles Soto and Rinzai.

places.name: Three Treasures Hamilton (Patrick Gallagher group)
places.notes: Hamilton sitting group under Patrick Gallagher Sensei.

places.name: White Wind Zen Community / Zen Centre of Ottawa (Honzan Dainen-ji)
places.notes: Founded 1985. Led by Ven. Anzan Hoshin Roshi. 9,700 sq ft heritage building.

places.name: Zen Ottawa / Flowing Bridge Sangha
places.lineage: Sanbō Zen (Patrick Gallagher Sensei; Theresa Redmond founder)
places.notes: Founded 2006 as Flowing Bridge Sangha.

places.name: Mountain Moon Sangha of Ottawa
places.lineage: Sanbō Zen / Mountain Moon (Sei'un An Roshi; teacher Carolyn Seburn)
places.notes: Carolyn Seburn, authorized Zen teacher in Mountain Moon lineage.

places.name: Guelph Zazenkai (White Wind)
places.lineage: Sōtō / Anzan Hoshin (White Wind Zen Community)
places.notes: Branch practice hall of WWZC under Anzan Hoshin Roshi.

places.name: Montreal Zen Center / Centre Zen de Montréal
places.notes: Founded 1979 under Albert Low (1928–2016). Lay community drawing on both Soto and Rinzai.

places.name: Association Zen de Montréal (Dojo Zen de Montréal)
places.notes: Affiliated with Soto School / Association Zen Internationale.

places.name: Enpuku-ji Zen Centre
places.notes: Affiliate of Rinzai-ji Los Angeles. Resident abbot Zengetsu Myōkyō.

places.name: Wake Up Montréal
places.notes: Young-adult Plum Village sangha; revived after hiatus.

places.name: Maple Village (Village d'Érable)
places.notes: Zen meditation retreat center in tradition of Thich Nhat Hanh, Eastern Townships, QC.

places.name: Kingston Zen Group (affiliated with Montreal Zen Center)
places.notes: Satellite sitting group of Montreal Zen Center.

places.name: Thousand Harbours Zen (Sensōji)
places.lineage: Sōtō (SZBA / SOTOZEN.COM listed); Rev. Koun Franz
places.address: 1895 Purcells Cove Road, Halifax, NS B3P 1C2
places.notes: Founded 2014 (formerly Zen Nova Scotia); hybrid online + in-person Tuesday evenings.

places.name: Atlantic Sōtō Zen Centre
places.address: Dalhousie Multifaith Centre, 1321 Edward Street, Halifax, NS B3H 1Z1
places.notes: Traditional Soto Zen service: zazen, kinhin, dharma study, sesshin.

places.name: Wolfville Zazenkai (White Wind)
places.lineage: Sōtō / Anzan Hoshin (White Wind Zen Community)
places.notes: Established August 1990 as branch of Anzan Hoshin's WWZC.

places.name: Sanbo Zen Saint John Meditation Group
places.notes: Small Sanbo Zen meditation group.
